SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY RODERICK SHEHEE--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO COST, PLAINTIFF IS EXEMPT FROM SERVICE FEES.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GORDON, STEPHANIE MARIE $600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
